behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths tested (CMakeLists.txt, SetupCcache.cmake, SetupSccache.cmake, bootstrap.sh, build.mjs, build-cache/, CONTRIBUTING.md, docs/project/contributing.mdx, docs/project/building-windows.mdx) are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what should change (use ccache only, remove sccache, skip gracefully) without specifying exact code replacements or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of 'sccache' strings and file/dir removal; any correct fix removing sccache would pass without depending on specific variable names or implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cmake -N, bash -n, sh -n subprocesses to actually execute/parse the modified files, in addition to string checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual file deletions (SetupSccache.cmake, build-cache/) and removal of sccache references from multiple docs; a stub cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors from instruction (ccache-only, graceful skip, directory removal, bootstrap change, doc updates) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are sectioned with comment headers (Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass static, Pass-to-pass repo_tests).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names relevant files but does not point to specific lines; localization is part of the task domain and the files are reasonably scoped.
